title: Invoice
description: A commercial invoice requesting payment for goods or services, itemizing a vendor, a bill-to party, and one or more line items.

invoiceNumber.description: The invoice's unique identifier as printed on the document.

invoiceDate.description: The date the invoice was issued, as YYYY-MM-DD.

vendorName.description: The name of the vendor issuing the invoice.

totalAmount.description: The total amount due on the invoice.
